title: Rule-Connect-GenerativeAI
description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega GenerativeAI connector rule (Rule-Connect-GenerativeAI). Defines model configuration, prompt references, attachment settings, input parameters, and response mappings. Validated against real Pega 26 rules (v2 era). Only authored fields are included; system-managed fields (pxCreateDateTime, pxUpdateOperator, pzInsKey, etc.) are omitted.

pyLabel.description: Human-readable display label for the connector.

pyClassName.description: The Pega class this connector is defined on (e.g., '@baseclass', 'MyOrg-MyApp-Work-MyCase', 'Work-').

pyServiceName.description: Service endpoint name — must match pyRuleName.

pyRuleName.description: Internal rule name (PascalCase or camelCase). Auto-filled from pyServiceName.

pyRuleSet.description: Ruleset the connector is saved to.

pyDescription.description: Optional free-text description of the connector's purpose.

pyExpectedResponseEntity.description: How the AI response is parsed. 'Custom' for text/JSON output, 'Single' for single-entity extraction, 'List' for list output with pyListName.

pyListName.description: Required when pyExpectedResponseEntity='List'; omit for 'Custom' and 'Single'. Dot-prefixed property path for the outer list (e.g., '.pyCucumberScenarios', '.pyStages').

pyCustomizeSystemPrompt.description: Whether a custom system prompt overrides the default. Set to 'false' to use the default system prompt.

pyIncludeAttachment.description: Attachment checkbox — whether case attachments are passed as input to the AI model. 'true' to enable; also set pyGenAIDef.pyImageAttachRefValue to the dot-prefixed clipboard path of the attachment property (e.g., '.pyAttachment').

pyDisplayMode.description: 'clone' for rules derived from template (most common), 'basic' for hand-authored, 'specialize' for specialized overrides.

pyMethodStatus.description: Optional status marker. 'Internal' for platform-internal connectors, 'Deprecated' for retired ones.

pyPromptName.description: User-prompt FieldValue name. Default is 'pyGenerativeAIPromptTemplate'. Do NOT generate custom prompt names unless the skill explicitly instructs it.

pySystemPromptName.description: System-prompt FieldValue name. Default is 'pzDefaultSystemPrompt'. Do NOT generate custom system prompt names unless the skill explicitly instructs it.

pyUseCase.description: Top-level use-case type. 'qa' for Q&A/text output, 'custom' for structured/JSON output. On v2 rules keep in sync with pyGenAIDef.pyUseCase.

pyUseOpLocaleForResponse.description: v1 locale flag — whether the AI response should use the operator's locale. Mirrors pyGenAIConfig.pyEnableLocalization on v2 rules.

pyGenAIDef.description: Prompt references and use-case definition (Embed-GenAI-Definition). Required on v2 rules (Pega 24.2+). Set pyUserPrompt, pySystemPrompt, pyUseCase, and pyImageAttachRefValue when pyIncludeAttachment='true'.

pyGenAIConfig.description: Model and locale configuration (Embed-GenAI-Config). Present on v2 rules (Pega 24.2+). Contains pyModelConfiguration with model ID, name, provider, and runtime parameters (including temperature). The server populates this from pyGenAIProvConfig on save; include explicitly only when overriding model selection.

pyResponseFields.description: Response field mappings — where the AI output is written on the clipboard. At least one entry required.

pyCustomFields.description: Named page group for custom field metadata (e.g., pyUsageMode). Present when pyIsCustomFieldExists='true'.

pyParameters.description: Input parameters for the connector. Defines named parameters that can be passed when the connector is invoked (e.g., from an Activity or Flow). Each entry specifies a parameter name and type.

GenAIDef.description: Prompt and use-case definition (Embed-GenAI-Definition). Present on v2 rules (Pega 24.2+). Contains prompt FieldValue references, use-case type, and the attachment field reference.

pyUseCase.description: Use-case type, mirroring the top-level pyUseCase. 'qa' for Q&A/text output, 'custom' for structured/JSON output.

pyImageAttachRefValue.description: Attachment field — dot-prefixed clipboard property path pointing to the attachment (e.g., '.pyAttachment'). Set only when pyIncludeAttachment='true'; omit otherwise.

GenAIConfig.description: Model and locale configuration (Embed-GenAI-Config). Present on v2 rules (Pega 24.2+). The server populates this from pyGenAIProvConfig on save.

pyEnableLocalization.description: Whether the AI response uses the operator's locale. Mirrors pyUseOpLocaleForResponse on v2 rules.

pyEnablePII.description: Whether PII redaction is enabled. Mirrors pyImprovePrivacy on v2 rules.

pyModelConfiguration.description: Selected AI model and runtime parameter overrides.

GenAIModel.description: Selected GenAI model and runtime parameters (Embed-GenAI-Model).

pyModelId.description: Model identifier. 'pega-default-fast' for standard tasks (Claude-3-Haiku), 'pega-default-smart' for more capable tasks.

pyDescription.description: Description of the model (e.g., 'Claude3 Chat Completions model').

pyModelParameters.description: Runtime parameter overrides. The server syncs the temperature entry from pyGenAIProvConfig.pyTemperature on save.

CustomField.description: A custom field entry (Embed-CustomFieldsList) — metadata tag on the connector.

pxSubscript.description: Key name of the custom field (e.g., 'pyUsageMode').

pyCFieldValue.description: Field value. For pyUsageMode: 'Runtime' for connectors called at runtime, 'Design time' for design-assistant connectors.

pyNote.description: Additional note on the custom field (e.g., 'Text'). Mirrors pyCFieldType on observed rules.

GenAIModelParameter.description: A model runtime parameter override (Embed-GenAI-Model-Parameters). Temperature is the most common entry.

pyValue.description: Override value (e.g., '0.2'). Should match pyGenAIProvConfig.pyTemperature for the temperature parameter.

pyDescription.description: Description of the parameter (e.g., 'Controls randomness of the generated output').

ResponseField.description: A response field mapping (Embed-Fields) — maps AI output to a clipboard property.

pyFieldName.description: Dot-prefixed clipboard property path where the AI output is written (e.g., '.pyResponseData', '.pyJsonData', '.pyMessage').

MethodParameter.description: A connector input parameter (Embed-MethodParams). Defines a named parameter that can be passed when the connector is invoked from an Activity, Flow, or other caller.

pyParametersParamType.description: Parameter data type. STRING is the most common for GenAI connector parameters.
